summary: Welcome page Log In - Cancel button functionality
description:
GIVEN the user is Anonymous (not logged in)
AND the user selects the "Get MLB.TV" tab in the header
AND the user selects the "Log In" link on the Welcome page

steps.action:
WHEN a user selects the [Cancel] button on the Log In page
OR the user selects the BACK button on the controller
steps.result: THEN the user is navigated to Welcome page
